basic_details.job_title: CSIR CSMCRI Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 62 Project Assistant, Project Associate and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Central Salt & Marine Chemicals Research Institute (CSIR CSMCRI)
basic_details.post_name: Project Assistant-II / Project Associate -I / Senior Project Associate / Principal Project Associate / Project Scientist -I / Project Scientist -II
basic_details.short_information: Central Salt & Marine Chemicals Research Institute (CSIR CSMCRI) has published the Project Assistant, Project Associate and More Posts Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 62 Project Assistant, Project Associate, Senior Project Associate, Principal Project Associate, and Project Scientist positions. Candidates within the age range of up to 40 years (with age relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST/PwBD/Women, 3 years for OBC) and holding qualifications such as B.Sc., M.Sc., B.E./B.Tech, or Ph.D. in relevant Science/Engineering disciplines are eligible to apply via email. The application

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Max age limit is 35 years for some posts, with relaxations as per Government of India/CSIR instructions.
age_limit.details: Project Assistant-II: Maximum age limit is 35 years. Senior Project Associate: Maximum age limit is 35 years. Principal Project Associate: Maximum age limit is 40 years. Project Scientist -I: Maximum age limit is 35 years. Project Scientist -II: Maximum age limit is 40 years. Age relaxations will be applicable as per Government of India/CSIR instructions.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate, Masters, Doctoral degrees in various scientific and technical fields.
qualification.details: Project Assistant-II: Bachelors in Science (Chemistry, Physics, Marine Science, Marine Biology, Marine Biology and Oceanography, Marine Biotechnology, Oceanography, Oceanography and Coastal Area Studies, Biotechnology, Microbiology, Botany, Plant Biology, Plant Biotechnology, Biochemistry, Zoology, Fisheries Sciences, Aquaculture, Environmental Science), Masters/Integrated Masters in Science (Inorganic/Organic/Physical/Analytical Chemistry, Botany, Biotechnology, Microbiology, Biochemistry, Marine Sciences, Zoology, Plant Science, Microbiology, Biochemistry, Biotechnology, Genetics and Plant Breeding, Marine Biology, Marine Biology and Oceanography, Marine Biotechnology, Oceanography, Oceanography and Coastal Area Studies, Plant Biology Plant Biotechnology, Fisheries Sciences, Aquaculture, Environmental Sciences), Bachelor's degree in Engineering or Technology (Chemical Engineering, IT/Computer Science, Civil/Mechanical Engineering). Senior Project Associate: Masters/Integrated Masters in Biochemistry/Biotechnology with 3 years' experience in R&D OR Doctoral Degree in Biological Sciences/Biochemistry with 2 years' experience in R&D. Masters/Integrated Masters in Botany/Biotechnology/Microbiology/Biochemistry/Marine Sciences with 3 years' experience in R&D OR Doctoral Degree in Biological Sciences/Botany/Biotechnology/Microbiology/Biochemistry with 2 years' experience in R&D. Masters/Integrated Masters in Chemical Science with 3 years' experience in R&D OR Doctoral Degree in Chemical Sciences with 2 years' experience in R&D (Desirable: Hands on experience in activities related to salt and marine chemicals). Masters/Integrated Masters in Chemical Science with 3 years' experience in R&D OR Doctoral Degree in Chemical Sciences with 2 years' experience in R&D (Desirable: Experience in Membrane R&D). Masters/Integrated Masters in Chemistry with 3 years' experience in R&D OR Doctoral Degree in Chemical Sciences with 2 years' experience in R&D (Desirable: Specialization membranes for Electrochemical energy systems). Masters/Integrated Masters in Chemical Sciences/Biological Science/Pharmaceutical Science with 3 years' experience in R&D OR Doctoral Degree in Biological/Pharmaceutical/Chemical Sciences with 2 years' experience in R&D (Desirable: Hands on experience in natural product isolation, purification, and structural elucidation; bioassay development; Microbial techniques). Bachelor's degree in Engineering or Technology in Electronics & Communication with 3 years' experience in R&D OR Masters/Integrated Masters in engineering in Electronics & Communication with 2 years' experience in R&D. Principal Project Associate: Masters/Integrated Masters in Biological Science/Biochemistry/Biotechnology/Molecular Biology/Botany with 6 years of experience in R&D OR Doctoral degree in Biochemistry/Biotechnology/Molecular Biology/Biological Science with 3 years' experience in R&D. Project Scientist -I: Doctoral Degree in Biological Sciences/Botany/Biotechnology/Microbiology/Biochemistry/Marine Sciences with 04 years' experience in R&D. Doctoral Degree in Chemical Science OR Masters/Integrated Masters in Chemical/Mechanical Engineering or Technology with 4 years' experience in R&D (Desirable: Project Management, report writing, Mentoring, Recovery of inorganic Chemicals, Pilot-scale demonstration). Doctoral Degree in Chemical Science with 4 years' experience in R&D (Desirable: Membrane science/Membrane Fabrication/Thin film composite membrane, Module fabrication). Doctoral Degree in Chemistry/Physics with 4 years' experience in R&D (Desirable: Functional membranes/Polyelectrolyte membrane/Bipolar membranes for water purification/water splitting/fuel cells/Flow Batteries and electrocatalyst etc.). Project Scientist -II: Doctoral Degree in Chemistry/Physics with 5 years' experience in R&D (Desirable: electrochemistry/ electrolyzer-related areas after Ph.D. with Experience in electrocatalysis, and/or electrolyzer development after Ph.D.). Doctoral Degree in Biological Sciences with 5 years' experience in R&D (Desirable: Doctoral Degree in Biotechnology or Molecular biology). Doctoral Degree in Agronomy/Agricultural Sciences with 5 years' experience in R&D. Masters/Integrated Masters in Engineering or Technology in Information Technology or Computer Science with 5 years' experience in R&D (Experience in web/software development, CMS, programming, databases, API integration, responsive design, debugging, and frontend-backend frameworks. Desirable: Data analysis, machine learning, Python/R/SQL, visualization tools, predictive modeling, and AI-driven analytics applications.).

salary_details.details: Project Assistant-II: ₹20,000+ HRA (Increment of 15% after 3 years of experience in the same project) Senior Project Associate: ₹31,000+ HRA for candidates with CSIR-UGC/ICAR/ICMR NET including Lectureship/ assistant professorship or GATE or National Level examination, OR ₹25,000+ HRA for others. Principal Project Associate: ₹49,000 + HRA Project Scientist -I: ₹56,000+ HRA (Increment of 5% for every 2 years of experience in the same project) Project Scientist -II: ₹67,000 + HRA (Increment of 5% for every 2 years of experience in the same project)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for CSIR CSMCRI Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 07-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download CSIR CSMCRI Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CSIR CSMCRI recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the CSIR CSMCRI recruitment is July 7, 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the CSIR CSMCRI recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 62 vacancies announced for various Project Assistant and Scientist positions in the CSIR CSMCRI recruitment.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for Project Assistant-II posts?
faq.answer: For Project Assistant-II posts, a Bachelor's degree in Science or Engineering/Technology is the minimum qualification, with specific specializations required.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for Project Scientist-II positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for Project Scientist-II positions is 40 years, with applicable age relaxations as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary range for the Project Scientist-II posts?
faq.answer: The salary for Project Scientist-II posts ranges from ₹67,000 + HRA, with potential increments for experience.

faq.question: Q6. How should candidates apply for these positions?
faq.answer: Candidates should apply by sending their complete application form along with all necessary documents via email to the specified address before the deadline.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee has been mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions are temporary in nature, as indicated in the recruitment details.

faq.question: Q9. Where is CSIR CSMCRI located?
faq.answer: CSIR CSMCRI is located in Bhavnagar, Gujarat, with the pincode 364002.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these positions will primarily involve an interview.
